programme.title: House Hunters
programme.desc: After a decade in Hong Kong, a couple of buyers look to be near family and relocate to Raleigh, North Carolina; one wants a small place like they had overseas, but the other wants to go big and prefers more room.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: Tropic Like It's Hot
programme.desc: A spicy California couple, who have been together since their teens, are ready to heat things up with a bold move to Roatán, Honduras; they're all in, but they have opposing ideas on what they want for their new island dream home.

programme.title: Tropic Like It's Hot
programme.desc: A bachelor enlists his wingman and cousin to help find a waterfront home on the Caribbean island of Bonaire; he's an avid scuba diver and wants a place for entertaining, but his list of must-haves may be a challenge for his agent.

programme.title: My Lottery Dream Home
programme.sub-title: Snow Place Like Home in Hub 2.0
programme.desc: A lucky couple's ready to add a second dream hub to their collection! David has already found them a Florida beach hub, and now they're calling on him once again to search for a snowy fairytale cabin in the Pocono Mountains of Pennsylvania.

programme.desc: Meet the new Shark PowerDetect Upright Vacuum with features like DuoClean Detect Technology, self-cleaning brush roll and odor neutralizing, and you will be cleaning faster, smarter and better!

programme.title: Fixer to Fabulous
programme.desc: Honoring her late husband's dream, Dave and Jenny Marrs help a woman transform a lakeside fixer into a stunning retreat; also, with a new grandbaby on the way, they race to deliver a family haven filled with love, memories and unforgettable lake views.

programme.title: World's Bargain Dream Homes
programme.desc: On the Italian island of Sicily, a local guide takes a couple on a unique tour of the sizzling local traditions as they explore affordable and dreamy homes.

programme.title: World's Bargain Dream Homes
programme.desc: On the Spanish coast just south of Barcelona, best friends from Texas look for an affordable dream home near Tarragona; with a local property expert, they tour through all the local culture and traditions the flavorful region has to offer.

programme.title: World's Bargain Dream Homes
programme.desc: A creative pair are ready to relocate for an artistic life in Puglia, Italy; with an expert local guide, they experience Italian countryside La Dolce Vita and tour breathtaking bargain homes that are far beyond what they could afford in the U.S.

programme.title: World's Bargain Dream Homes

programme.title: World's Bargain Dream Homes
programme.desc: On the Greek island of Crete, a Tennessee woman travels 6000 miles in search of her forever home; with her bestie along, they discover the magic of local life, bargain homes, and the cheap cost of living.

programme.title: World's Bargain Dream Homes
programme.desc: In the Italian region of Tuscany, a real estate expert helps a husband and wife search for a bargain dream home for their family; with insider knowledge on the local Tuscan culture, the couple discovers hidden gems and Italian traditions.

programme.title: RateEscape: Stop Overpaying For Cellular
